params.code:
# Parametric spur gear — tweak the #@param knobs (on the node or in /ui)
import math
teeth = 16        #@param int min=6 max=40
radius = 18.0     #@param min=8 max=40 step=1
thickness = 6.0   #@param min=2 max=20 step=0.5
bore = 5.0        #@param min=0 max=14 step=0.5

body = Cylinder(radius, thickness)
tooth = Box((2 * math.pi * radius / teeth) * 0.55, radius * 0.36, thickness)
g = body
for i in range(int(teeth)):
    g += Rot(0, 0, i * 360.0 / teeth) * (Pos(0, radius, 0) * tooth)
if bore > 0:
    g -= Cylinder(bore, thickness)
result = g

params.text:
Custom node from scratch

This whole spur gear is ONE CodeBlock of build123d Python. Its #@param knobs (teeth, radius, thickness, bore) become live widgets — tweak them on the node or in /ui and the gear rebuilds.
